prompt: In Mail, create a reply-all DRAFT to a multi-recipient message (subject containing 'KinBench 136') with body 'KinBench 136 reply-all'. Do NOT send — save as draft. If no seed inbox message exists, create a fallback NEW draft with subject 'Re: KinBench 136' and body 'KinBench 136 reply-all' with To: a@example.com and Cc: b@example.com,c@example.com. Fast path for fallback: `cerebellum 'mail draft_with_cc "Re: KinBench 136" a@example.com "b@example.com, c@example.com" "KinBench 136 reply-all"'`.
